intro: Neuontobotrys linearifolius, also known as 'Tetradenia tetragona', is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Neuontobotrys linearifolius include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and infectious diseases.
